SuperFAISS at tag v3.1.1 (commit d62c162 — the tag's library source; v3.1.1 adds only CI + an x86-guarded mirror test over the vendored point) — v3.0 channel-capable scratch banks + channel-scoped analytics + archive v3, v3.1 runtime-mutable channel vocabulary (Relabel), and the v3.1.1 AVX2 float32 dot/L2 sub-8 segment-remainder fix (T-099: a length-4 channel scored 0 on AVX2; segmented/per-channel-cosine path only). Only src/kernels_avx2.cpp changed since the v3.1 tag (3bc6798).
